title: Timeline Connecting to Duration with Mirror Number

posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Happy Wednesday to everyone in the community. I am playing with the functions of CONNECT BOARDS & MIRROR. Here is the question how to do the connection btw column leadtime and column timeline

  • Column [Leadtime] is a mirror referring to Column [Category]
  • I would like the timeline “connect with a duration” link to the mirror column [Leadtime]. Is it doable?

Questoin1121×736 83.9 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Han

Unfortunately that is not possible. The content of a mirror column is only visible in your browser and that data is not available in the monday backend to be used in automations or (as in this case) input as a duration.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
